Package org.eventb.internal.ui.prover

Class ControlHolder

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.ui.prover.ControlHolder
Direct Known Subclasses:
YellowBoxHolder
public class ControlHolder extends Object
Class used to register controls in a StyledText. This class is able to paint and place the control that it holds in the parent styled text.
